queries.question: In cities with populations larger than 75,000, can you give me the number of births per year? Also show these cities and population.
queries.sql: SELECT BirthYears.Number_Of_Births, BirthYears.City, AgeGroupPopulations.TotalPopulation FROM BirthYears JOIN AgeGroupPopulations ON BirthYears.City = AgeGroupPopulations.CityName WHERE AgeGroupPopulations.TotalPopulation > 75000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?number_of_births ?city ?totalpopulation WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Number_Of_Births ?number_of_births .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f > 75000)
}

queries.question: In cities with populations larger than 75,000, can you give me the crude birth rate? Also show these cities and population.
queries.sql: SELECT BirthYears.Crude_Birth_Rate, BirthYears.City, AgeGroupPopulations.TotalPopulation FROM BirthYears JOIN AgeGroupPopulations ON BirthYears.City = AgeGroupPopulations.CityName WHERE AgeGroupPopulations.TotalPopulation > 75000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?crude_birth_rate ?city ?totalpopulation WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Crude_Birth_Rate ?crude_birth_rate .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .

queries.question: Show me the crude birth rate for the most populous city, its population and name
queries.sql: SELECT BirthYears.Crude_Birth_Rate, AgeGroupPopulations.TotalPopulation, AgeGroupPopulations.CityName FROM BirthYears JOIN AgeGroupPopulations ON BirthYears.City = AgeGroupPopulations.CityName ORDER BY AgeGroupPopulations.TotalPopulation DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?crude_birth_rate ?totalpopulation ?cityname WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Crude_Birth_Rate ?crude_birth_rate .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_o .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?totalpopulation_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show me the crude birth rate for the most populous city, the number of people born there, its population and name.
queries.sql: SELECT BirthYears.Number_Of_Births, Crude_Birth_Rate, AgeGroupPopulations.TotalPopulation, AgeGroupPopulations.CityName FROM BirthYears JOIN AgeGroupPopulations ON BirthYears.City = AgeGroupPopulations.CityName ORDER BY AgeGroupPopulations.TotalPopulation DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?number_of_births ?crude_birth_rate ?totalpopulation ?cityname WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Number_Of_Births ?number_of_births .
  ?birthyears p:Crude_Birth_Rate ?crude_birth_rate .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_o .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?totalpopulation_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show the birth rate, city and population for cities with a population greater than 75,000 people
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?number_of_births ?city ?totalpopulation WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Number_Of_Births ?number_of_births .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f > 75000)
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?crude_birth_rate ?city ?totalpopulation WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Crude_Birth_Rate ?crude_birth_rate .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f > 75000)
} }
  full: { SELECT ?number_of_births ?crude_birth_rate ?city ?totalpopulation WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Number_Of_Births ?number_of_births .
  ?birthyears p:Crude_Birth_Rate ?crude_birth_rate .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f > 75000)
} }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the birth rate for the most populous city, its population and name
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?crude_birth_rate ?totalpopulation ?cityname WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Crude_Birth_Rate ?crude_birth_rate .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_o .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?totalpopulation_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?number_of_births ?crude_birth_rate ?totalpopulation ?cityname WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Number_Of_Births ?number_of_births .
  ?birthyears p:Crude_Birth_Rate ?crude_birth_rate .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_o .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?totalpopulation_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?number_of_births ?totalpopulation ?cityname WHERE {
  ?birthyears a :BirthYears .
  ?agegrouppopulations a :AgeGroupPopulations .
  ?birthyears p:City ?city_l .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname_r .
  ?birthyears p:Number_Of_Births ?number_of_births .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:CityName ?cityname .
  ?agegrouppopulations p:TotalPopulation ?totalpopulation_o .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?cityname_r))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?totalpopulation_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
